Permit Review Plus / Los Angeles

Before you bid, buy, list, quote, or submit, see what the public record says.

PermitPulse checks official permit, parcel, zoning, and planning records for one LA property and turns the mess into a clean first-pass snapshot.

Text One Address Email One Address

No spam. No obligation. First-pass public-record review only. Not legal, title, architectural, or permit-expediting advice.

Redacted sample format
Proof

Sample Report: Address and client details redacted

The preview below shows the structure of a first-pass Permit Review Plus read. Actual findings depend on what official and public-record sources show for the specific property.

Property
[REDACTED] Los Angeles, CA 900xx
Permit record
Public permit activity appears available. Manual verification recommended before relying on status.
Parcel/APN
Parcel match checked against address-style and assessor-style evidence where available.
Zoning/planning
Planning and map-layer signals summarized for obvious constraints or follow-up questions.
Risk flags
Open items, missing records, scope mismatch signals, or records needing manual confirmation.

What the sample proves

This is not a generic lead form or automated certainty score. It is a clean, address-specific first pass that organizes public-record signals so you know what to verify next.

Text One Address Email One Address
Scope

What Permit Review Plus Checks

  • Building permit records
  • Parcel/APN confirmation
  • Zoning and planning records
  • LADBS / ZIMAS / Assessor-style evidence where available
  • Obvious red flags, missing records, or items needing manual confirmation
Use cases

Who This Helps

01

Remodelers quoting a job

02

ADU builders screening a lead

03

Permit expeditors doing intake

04

Agents and investors checking public records

05

Property owners trying to understand what is already on file

Offer

Permit Review Plus — $149

Clean first-pass official/public-record review for one LA property, delivered in 24 to 48 business hours.

Standard$149
Turnaround24 to 48 business hours

Express Permit Review Plus

Rush review may be available in 4 business hours or less when scheduling allows. Higher fee applies.

Testing this with a few LA operators this week. Send one address and I’ll tell you if it’s a good fit before you pay.
